news.headline: European Union countries are considering new measures to increase flexibility in gas storage to combat market volatility.
Aptiv (NYSE: APTV) to release 1st quarter 2025 financial results on May 1 at 8:00 a.m. ET. Webcast available at ir.aptiv.com.
news.summary: Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV) is set to announce its first quarter 2025 financial outcomes on May 1, 2025, with an investor call scheduled at 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day. The call, to be led by Aptiv's Chair and Chief Executive Officer Kevin Clark and Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Varun Laroyia, will provide insights into the results. Access to the live webcast and presentation materials will be provided on the Aptiv Investor Relations website at ir.aptiv.com. The call will also be available for replay.

news.headline: KB Home opens new community Monteverdi in Horsethief Canyon, Corona, CA with modern homes for sale. $KBH #RealEstate
news.summary: In Corona, California, KB Home (NYSE: KBH) unveiled Monteverdi, its latest community in the sought-after Horsethief Canyon area. The homes cater to modern living preferences, boasting contemporary kitchens connected to spacious great rooms, bedroom suites with walk-in closets, and generous storage. The Monteverdi community offers a mix of one- and two-story houses, demonstrating KB Home's renowned quality as one of the leading U.S. homebuilders. This addition aligns with KB Home's focus on constructing residences that cater to current lifestyle needs in a desirable location.

news.headline: Brookfield Real Assets Income Fund Inc. (NYSE: RA) sets Q2 2025 distribution schedule with monthly distributions for April, May, and June.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, Brookfield Real Assets Income Fund Inc. (NYSE: RA) revealed its monthly distributions for April, May, and June 2025. The Board of Directors declared these distributions for shareholders.

news.headline: Traws Pharma CEO to retire, new interim CEO appointed, effective on March 31, 2025 after filing Form 10-K. Iain Dukes to take over.
news.summary: Traws Pharma, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol TRAW, based in Newtown, Pennsylvania, declared the retirement of Werner Cautreels, PhD, as Chief Executive Officer effective March 31, 2025, following the submission of the Annual Report on Form 10-K to the SEC. Iain D. Dukes, D Phil, will take over as the Interim CEO while retaining his position as Chairman of Traws. The company specializes in developing innovative therapies to combat respiratory viral diseases, an area crucial for human health.

news.headline: United Community Banks, Inc. (NYSE: UCB) to release Q1 2025 results on April 22, 2025, with conference call at 9:00 a.m. EST.
news.summary: Greenville, South Carolina - On March 28, 2025, United Community Banks, Inc. (NYSE: UCB) revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on April 22, 2025, before the stock market opens. Additionally, the company will conduct a conference call at 9:00 a.m. EST on the same day to review its financial results, business achievements, and future projections.

news.headline: Markforged (NYSE: MKFG) reports Q4 and full year 2024 financial results, strengthening manufacturing resiliency.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, in Waltham, Massachusetts, Markforged Holding Corporation (NYSE: MKFG) revealed its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024. Markforged specializes in empowering manufacturing resilience through facilitating industrial production where it is required.

news.headline: Sumitomo Forestry America consolidates homes under DRB Group, merging two companies into one starting April 1, 2025.
news.summary: Investing efforts to strengthen The DRB Group, Sumitomo Forestry America, Inc. has disclosed plans to merge two homebuilding firms into one. Effective April 1, Brightland Homes, situated in Dallas, will join forces with another company to form a consolidated entity within the group. The reorganization marks a strategic step forward for the development and residential building sector.

news.headline: PTC Therapeutics granted 12,000 stock options and 28,220 RSUs under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) on March 24, 2025.
news.summary: PTC Therapeutics, Inc., based in Warren, N.J., disclosed on March 28, 2025, that they have granted non-statutory stock options for the acquisition of a total of 12,000 shares of their common stock and 28,220 restricted stock units ("RSUs") on March 24, 2025. The company operates under the NASDAQ symbol PTCT.

news.headline: Nokia Corp buys back shares on 28.03.2025 in a repurchase move.
Lotus Technology to report Q4 & full year 2024 financial results on April 22, 2025 - Nasdaq: LOT.
news.summary: Lotus Technology Inc., a prominent global intelligent and luxury mobility provider, is set to release its unaudited financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on April 22, 2025, before the U.S. market opens. The company, traded on Nasdaq under the symbol LOT, will unveil these figures to the public.

news.headline: Metropolitan Water District assures reliable water supply for SoCal despite dry winter, thanks to snowfall in the Sierra.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, the General Manager of Metropolitan Water District, Deven Upadhyay, has released a statement regarding the California Department of Water Resources’ fourth snow survey. Despite Southern California experiencing a dry winter, reliable water supplies are ensured this year due to significant snowfall in the northern Sierra region. Metropolitan's involvement in the State Water Project enables the region to access water generated from this snowpack. The statement highlights that Southern California will have ample water resources despite the dry season.

news.headline: NJ regulator directs Robinhood and Kalshi to cease sports betting services for residents, voiding current wagers.
news.summary: On Thursday, state regulators mandated that companies close their sports-related services for New Jersey residents and cancel any current bets placed by locals.

news.headline: Native Forward Scholars Fund hosts virtual graduation regalia walk to celebrate Native cultures, communities, and achievements.
news.summary: The Native Forward Scholars Fund recently organized a virtual graduation regalia walk in Albuquerque, NM, on March 28, 2025, to honor and celebrate Native cultures, communities, and accomplishments. This event comes at a time when numerous educational institutions are discontinuing Indigenous graduation ceremonies this season due to political reasons.

news.headline: AT&T announces $0.2775 quarterly dividend per common share, payable on May 1, 2025. Board of directors declares dividend.
news.summary: Today, in Dallas, the board of directors announced a quarterly dividend of $0.2775 per share for the company's common stock. Shareholders can expect this dividend to be paid out on May 1, 2025. Key highlights include the declaration of this dividend amount by the board of directors for the mentioned quarter.

news.headline: AI industry growth driven by Agentic AI and enterprise integration, with top 10 opportunities. -London, March 28, 2025.
news.summary: In London on March 28, 2025, it was reported that Artificial Intelligence (AI) is projected to transform various industries, offering significant growth opportunities. Among the top 10 AI growth prospects highlighted are Agentic AI, MLOps platforms, and foundational technologies. These innovations aim to drive innovation, boost efficiency, and promote responsible AI development. This shift towards AI advancement is expected to lead to growth and transformation across industries, propelling them into a new era of technological progress and optimization.

news.headline: Galaxy Digital settles for $200M over LUNA misrepresentations with NY Attorney General after the coin's 2022 collapse.
news.summary: A settlement has been reached between Galaxy Digital and the New York Attorney General regarding the firm's management of LUNA prior to its collapse in 2022. The agreement comes after scrutiny from regulators and legal authorities, with significant financial implications involved. The terms of the settlement were not disclosed, but it marks a significant development in the aftermath of the digital asset's downfall. This resolution underscores the importance of regulatory compliance and transparency in the cryptocurrency industry, highlighting the consequences for firms that fail to meet these standards.

news.headline: Verde Clean Fuels, Inc. released Q4 and FY 2024 results, advancing plans to develop liquid fuels processing tech.
news.summary: In Houston, Verde Clean Fuels, Inc. (NASDAQ: VGAS) announced its financial results for Q4 and full year 2024. The company is progressing in deploying its exclusive liquid fuels processing technology by establishing commercial production plants. In 2024, Verde signed a partnership with Cottonmouth and initiated FEED for the Permian Basin project, aiming to create a natural gas-to-gasoline plant in collaboration with Cot.

news.headline: Pacific Coast Oil Trust reports no cash distribution for March 28, 2025 based on January 2025 profits. Royalty trust OTC–ROYTL.
news.summary: In Houston, the Pacific Coast Oil Trust (OTC–ROYTL) shared that no cash distribution will be given to unit holders recorded on March 28, 2025. This decision aligns with the Trust's assessment of net profits for January 2025, as outlined in the Conveyance. The Trust, established by Pacific Coast Energy Company LP, made this announcement today.

news.headline: Trump ends remarks to reporters aboard Air Force One.
Trump: I am willing to make deals on auto tariffs.
Ambow Education reported financial results for second half and full-year 2024, with emphasis on expanding digital learning through AI.
news.summary: HybriU, a leading digital learning platform, is increasing its educational offerings with the help of artificial intelligence. The platform's expansion will provide access to a wider range of courses and resources for learners. By leveraging AI technology, HybriU aims to enhance the learning experience for its users. This initiative is part of the company's strategic plan to grow its user base. The new digital learning opportunities will impact over 100,000 individuals, offering them more personalized and advanced learning tools. Through this expansion, HybriU is set to revolutionize the online learning landscape and cater to the evolving needs of modern learners.

news.headline: Beauty industry shifting to waterless products due to sustainability reasons. Traditional skincare products contain up to 90% water. Waterless beauty growing segment estimated to reach 17.21 billion.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, in Los Angeles, a report revealed the heavy reliance of the beauty industry on water, as traditional skincare products typically consist of 90% water serving as a filler. A rapidly expanding sector in the beauty industry is waterless beauty, which is anticipated to reach 17.21% growth.

news.headline: Trump: Deals on averting auto tariffs would come later.
Trump pardons 3 BitMEX co-founders who pleaded guilty to felonies including money laundering and Bank Secrecy Act violations.
news.summary: US President Donald Trump has pardoned three co-founders of the cryptocurrency exchange BitMEX, who pleaded guilty to felony charges related to money laundering and violating the Bank Secrecy Act. Arthur Hayes and Benjamin Delo admitted to failing to implement an Anti-Money Laundering program, while Samuel Reed also pleaded guilty. Trump's pardons are part of a series of controversial federal pardons he has issued since taking office, including to individuals involved in the Jan. 6 Capitol riot and Silk Road founder Ross Ulbricht. The BitMEX co-founders were sentenced to home arrest or probation and ordered to pay $30 million in penalties as part of a civil case with the US Commodity Futures Trading Commission. The reasons for Trump's pardon were unclear, as the men had already been sentenced. The exchange had also agreed to pay $100 million in consent payments to US regulatory bodies in 2021. This is a developing story with more information expected to be added later.

news.headline: Bitcoin may break $83,000 as it approaches its third "death cross". Possible if averages don't shift in 1-2 weeks.
news.summary: In a recent podcast, the founder of IntoTheCryptoverse, Benjamin Cowen, issued a warning about Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) nearing another "death cross." Cowen predicts that if no changes occur in the next one to two weeks, Bitcoin is likely to experience its third death cross in the current cycle. This event occurs when the 50-day simple moving average crosses below the 200-day simple moving average. The previous death crosses for Bitcoin in this cycle took place in September 2023 and August 2024. This news suggests potential bearish implications for Bitcoin's price movement.

news.headline: Trump I will be announcing pharma tariffs soon.
Arialief brand warns consumers about unauthorized sellers to ensure product authenticity.公Reports indicate online misrepresentation.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, in Seattle, a public advisory was released by the official brand associated with Arialief, a product created by Bioventra. The advisory addresses concerns about unauthorized third-party sellers misleadingly advertising the product online. There have been reports highlighting this issue, indicating a growing problem within the market.

news.headline: Trump: I've always loved Canada.
Enzo Biochem to voluntarily delist from NYSE and transfer trading to OTCQX - announced on March 28, 2025.
news.summary: Enzo Biochem, Inc. (NYSE: ENZ) based in Farmingdale, N.Y., revealed on March 28, 2025, its decision to voluntarily remove its common stock from The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE). The Company plans to have its common stock traded on the OTCQX Best Market (OTCQX) instead.

news.headline: Castle Biosciences presents DecisionDx-SCC data at NCCN 2025, enhancing risk stratification beyond current staging.
news.summary: Castle Biosciences is set to unveil latest findings on DecisionDx-SCC and DecisionDx-Melanoma at the NCCN 2025 Annual Conference. The conference will provide a platform for the presentation of key data related to these diagnostic tests used in the identification of skin cancer. The insights shared at the event will include critical information about the performance and impact of DecisionDx-SCC and DecisionDx-Melanoma in clinical settings. Attendees can expect to gain valuable knowledge from the data presented, further enhancing awareness and understanding of these innovative diagnostic tools. This conference serves as a vital opportunity to showcase the advancements in skin cancer detection, benefiting healthcare professionals and patients alike.

news.headline: Canada's PM Carney: It's the preference of Canada that Mexico would be part of the discussions.
Calibre Mining files materials for special meeting in connection with Equinox Gold merger; shareholders to vote soon.
news.summary: Calibre Mining Corp. (TSX: CXB; OTCQX: CXBMF) based in Vancouver, British Columbia, has announced the filing and commencement of the mailing process for its management information circular (the “Circular”) and related materials regarding the business combination with Equinox Gold Corp. (TSX: EQX; NYSE: EQX). The special meeting is set for holders of Calibre common shares (the “Calibre Shareholders”) and holders of options issued under Calibre’s amended and restated long-term incentive plan (the “Calibre Optionholders”). This Arrangement involves significant companies in the mining sector, with Calibre being a prominent player with a market presence reflected by its TSX and OTCQX listings, and Equinox with its TSX and NYSE presence. The Meeting will address important matters impacting the stakeholders involved, including the Calibre Securityholders, marking a crucial step in this strategic process.

news.headline: Canada's PM Carney: It's not clear whether there will be new trade discussions between Canada, the US and Mexico.

FutureFuel Corp reported Q4 2024 revenue of $61.5M, a 33% decrease from Q4 2023. Net income was $2.8M, down from $23.4M. For the year 2024, revenue was $243.3M, a 34% decrease from 2023, with net income of $15.5M, down from $37.4M. Adjusted EBITDA for Q4 was $4.6M and $17.6M for the year. Cash and cash equivalents totaled $109.5M as of Dec 31, 2024. Capital expenditures in 2024 were $14.7M. A special cash dividend of $2.50 per common share was paid in April 9, 2024.
news.summary: FutureFuel Corp. announced financial results for Q4 and year ended Dec 31, 2024. In Q4 2024, revenues were $61.5 million, down by 33% compared to Q4 2023, with net income of $2.8 million ($0.06 per share). Adjusted EBITDA was $4.6 million. For the year 2024, revenues were $243.3 million, a decrease of 34% from 2023, with net income of $15.5 million ($0.35 per share) and adjusted EBITDA of $17.6 million. Capital expenditures were $14.7 million in 2024. Cash and cash equivalents were $109.5 million as of Dec 31, 2024. FutureFuel's chemicals segment faced reduced margins due to production delays, while the biofuel segment saw lower sales volumes and prices. The company declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.06 per share. FutureFuel is advocating for clarity on the Inflation Reduction Act. The firm uses adjusted EBITDA as a key metric.

news.headline: Canada's PM Carney: Trump policies may slow growth, boost inflation in the US.
Blackstone's buyout fund is ending late and falling short of its initial goals.
Canada's PM Carney: Trump did not give any guarantees that he would back down on tariffs on autos, steel, and aluminum.
GameStop seeks Bitcoin, miners face fee cuts, Robinhood on pause after trades surface.
news.summary: Investors are taking advantage of GameStop's poorly received Bitcoin update, leading to a significant drop in BTC prices. This development is causing major concerns for Bitcoin miners, who are facing a significant decrease in fees.

news.headline: Genelux Corp reports Q4 and full year 2024 results, aligns with FDA for Olvi-Vec approval in Ovarian Cancer.
news.summary: An agreement has been reached with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration regarding crucial aspects of the approval process for Olvi-Vec in Platinum Resistant/Refractory Ovarian Cancer. This development marks a significant milestone in the regulatory pathway for the drug, indicating progress towards approval for this specific indication. The alignment on key elements of the approval pathway demonstrates a positive step forward in the development and potential availability of Olvi-Vec for patients with Platinum Resistant/Refractory Ovarian Cancer in the U.S.

news.headline: FutureFuel's 2024 results show net income of $15.5M ($0.35/share) and adjusted EBITDA of $17.6M. Successful financial year.
news.summary: The company posted a net income of $15.5 million, equivalent to $0.35 per diluted share. Additionally, their Adjusted EBITDA stood at $17.6 million.

news.headline: US regulators FDIC, CFTC relax crypto rules for banks; institutions can engage in digital asset activities without prior approval. FDIC warns of associated risks. CFTC confirms digital asset derivatives treated same as any other derivatives. Regulatory shift aligns with favorable climate under Trump admin, paving way for crypto growth in US market.  Magazine raises conflict of interest concerns over Trump's crypto involvement.
news.summary: The FDIC has announced that banks can now engage in crypto-related activities without prior approval, rescinding a previous requirement under Biden's administration. These activities include custodianship, stablecoin reserves, issuing digital assets, and participating in blockchain-based systems. Institutions must consider risks like market, cybersecurity, and AML requirements. The CFTC also stated that digital asset derivatives will not be treated differently from other derivatives, with this change being effective immediately. The shift aligns with a more favorable regulatory environment under Trump's administration, with firms like Coinbase and Kraken expanding into the derivatives market. Trump's goal is to make the US the "crypto capital of the planet," but concerns about conflicts of interest and insider trading have been raised.

news.headline: AllianceBernstein National Municipal Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE: AFB) reports Q1 earnings, with total net assets on Jan 31, 2025.
news.summary: In New York on March 28, 2025, AllianceBernstein National Municipal Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE: AFB), a closed-end investment entity, disclosed its quarterly earnings for the period concluding on January 31, 2025. The Fund reported total net assets as of January 31, 2025.

news.headline: Curis to report Q4 2024 financial results on March 31, 2025. Focus on emavusertib development (CA-4948) - IRAK4 inhibitor.
news.summary: In Lexington, Massachusetts, on March 28, 2025, Curis, Inc. disclosed plans to release its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024. Recognized as a biotech firm concentrated on emavusertib (CA-4948), an oral IRAK4 inhibitor, the company operates under the ticker NASDAQ: CRIS.

news.headline: Qfitlia approved in US as first therapy for hemophilia A/B with or without inhibitors, a major step in treatment.
news.summary: Qfitlia has been officially approved as the inaugural therapy within the United States for the treatment of hemophilia A or B, regardless of the presence of inhibitors. This marks a significant milestone, as Qfitlia is now available as a treatment option for individuals affected by hemophilia A or B within the country.

news.headline: Boxlight reported Q4 revenue of $24.0 million, representing a 38.2% decrease from the prior year quarter.
news.summary: In Duluth, Georgia, Boxlight Corporation (Nasdaq: BOXL) shared its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024. During the quarter, revenue stood at $24.0 million, marking a 38.2% decrease from the same quarter in the previous year. The gross profit margin for Q4'24 dropped by 110 basis points to 30.6% compared to the previous year. The company reported a net loss for the period, with further details not specified. Boxlight is recognized as a top provider of interactive technology solutions.

news.headline: Pactiv Evergreen Inc. has received all needed regulatory approvals for Novolex acquisition.
news.summary: Pactiv Evergreen Inc. has successfully attained all necessary regulatory approvals for its intended acquisition by Novolex. This strategic move will see Novolex taking over Pactiv Evergreen Inc., marking a significant development in the business world. The acquisition has garnered attention due to its scale and importance. The approval process has concluded, highlighting the readiness of both companies to proceed with this substantial transaction. This acquisition involves a substantial amount of money and signifies a major change in the landscape of the industry.

news.headline: Arbor Realty Trust declares dividends on preferred stocks: $0.3984375, $0.390625, and $0.390625 per share respectively. Payable on April 30, 2025 to stockholders of record on April 15, 2025.
news.summary: Arbor Realty Trust, Inc. revealed today that the Board of Directors has approved cash dividends for its Series D, Series E, and Series F cumulative redeemable preferred stock. The dividends amount to $0.3984375, $0.390625, and $0.390625 per share for Series D, E, and F, respectively. These dividends represent accrued dividends from January 30, 2025, through April 29, 2025. Shareholders of record as of April 15, 2025, will receive the dividends on April 30, 2025. Arbor Realty Trust, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ABR.

news.headline: Connect Biopharma received Nasdaq deficiency notice for ADS bid prices closing below $1.00 for 30 days.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, Connect Biopharma Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: CNTB) disclosed that it had been notified by the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC about its American Depositary Shares (ADSs) consistently closing below the minimum bid price of $1.00 per share for the last 30 business days. Connect Biopharma, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in asthma and COPD care, received the letter on March 24, 2025, from Nasdaq's Listings Qualifications Department. This situation poses a risk to the Company's listing on the Nasdaq Global Market under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5450(a)(1).

news.headline: AIMA shareholders approved Business Combination with Taiwanese health tech co., Docter Inc. 93.8% voted in favor.
news.summary: Wilmington, DE - March 28, 2025 - Aimfinity Investment Corp. I (Nasdaq: AIMAU), a special purpose acquisition company, disclosed that the business combination with Docter Inc., a Taiwanese health technology firm, received approval at an extraordinary general meeting on March 27, 2025. About 93.8% of votes at the meeting favored the merger.
